arts.ttl: Inter vs. Torino, a clash between two high-flyers
arts.sum: Inter have won their last four Serie A games against Torino without conceding a single goal; the Nerazzurri have only enjoyed a longer run of consecutive wins whilst also keeping a clean sheet in the competition against Atalanta (five between September 1951 and September 1953) and Genoa (seven between November 2018 and August 2021). Inter lost their last home match in Serie A to Milan, after a 17-game unbeaten run at home (W13 D4); the last time the Nerazzurri lose two consecutive home games in the competition was between March and April 2023.

arts.ttl: Torino’s Vanoli: “Vlasic is an important player who’s been out for a long time”
arts.sum: On the eve of Torino’s match against Inter Milan, coach Paolo Vanoli addressed the media in a press conference. Due to his suspension, assistant coach Godinho will be on the sidelines for the game. Vanoli emphasized the importance of belief in the team’s approach: “We must believe in what we’re doing. Negative periods are part of the journey, and a team like ours can’t be perfect as we’re still improving our mechanisms. We need to be balanced. We know we’re facing a great team, but to achieve something important, we need courage. We must play with personality.” Reflecting on the The post Torino’s Vanoli: “Vlasic is an important player who’s been out for a long time” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Simone Inzaghi 'responds to Man United job offer' after 'frantic' Erik ten Hag talks
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly offer Simone Inzaghi the chance to take charge of the Red Devils during the international break, but the Inter Milan boss turns down the job.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Simone Inzaghi rejects chance to replace Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Inter Milan boss Simone Inzaghi has reportedly turned down the chance to replace Erik ten Hag as Manchester United head coach. That is according to Italian journalist Tancredi Palmeri, who has revealed that Man Utd offered Inzaghi the chance to replace Ten Hag with immediate effect during the October international break.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Torino: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Serie A action resumes after the midweek European fixtures, reigning champions Inter Milan welcome high-flying Torino to the iconic San Siro on Saturday evening. Both teams are locked on 11 points in the league standings, setting the stage for an enthralling encounter. Inter Milan have shown signs of improvement after a brief dip in form, securing back-to-back victories in their last two outings. Their 3-2 win over Udinese in Serie A was followed by a commanding 4-0 triumph against Red Star Belgrade in the Champions League.
